description: TCEL Tenant-9 Capital Allocation package (T9-005), onboarded as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata. Depends on Foundation (T9-001), Banking (T9-002), Trading (T9-003), and Enterprise Risk (T9-004). Entities from the T9-005 schemas (CapitalAllocationRecommendation, ManagerAllocationScore); the CA-001..020 decision-control catalog becomes executable rules where expressible plus a traceability knowledge asset; CapitalAllocation.AI is a governed advisory optimizer (no autonomous execution/transfer). Manager allocation scores ride the KPI mechanism. Boundary vs T9-004 (Enterprise Risk): T9-004 owns the risk aggregation this package CONSUMES as constraints; T9-005 owns allocation decisions and recommendations. Omits ModelDriftDetected (Banking owns it) to avoid a cross-package event collision; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived.
name: TCEL Capital Allocation & Optimization

entities.description: A CapitalAllocation.AI allocation recommendation - advisory, human-approved (T9-005 schema).

rules.name: Manager eligibility required
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CIO/CRO). Reject allocation to an ineligible manager.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-001: allocation to manager {managerId} rejected - manager is not eligible (CIO/CRO).

rules.name: Manager compliance frozen
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CCO). Reject/freeze allocation to a manager whose compliance status is Frozen.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-002: allocation to manager {managerId} rejected - compliance status is Frozen (CCO).

rules.name: Minimum liquidity reserve
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CFO). Reject or reduce allocation that breaches the minimum liquidity reserve.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-003: allocation rejected - it would breach the minimum liquidity reserve (CFO).

rules.name: Enterprise risk appetite
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject or constrain an allocation that breaches enterprise risk appetite.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-004: allocation rejected - it breaches enterprise risk appetite (CRO).

rules.name: Stale or incomplete data
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Model Risk). Set DataRestricted on stale/incomplete allocation inputs.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-008: allocation input is stale/incomplete - DataRestricted (Model Risk).

rules.name: Unresolved critical reconciliation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Accounting). Block allocation while a critical reconciliation is unresolved.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-009: allocation blocked - an unresolved critical reconciliation exists (Accounting).

rules.name: AI execution boundary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Model Risk). Deny an agent's attempt to execute a capital transfer.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-011: capital transfer denied - an AI agent may not execute transfers; agents are advisory-only (Model Risk).

rules.name: Tax/legal restriction validation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Legal/Tax). Reject or route for review an allocation with a tax/legal restriction.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-019: allocation rejected - a tax/legal restriction applies; routed for review (Legal/Tax).

rules.name: Scenario stress limit
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject an allocation that fails the stress scenario.
rules.reasonTemplate: CA-020: allocation rejected - it fails the stress scenario limit (CRO).

capabilities.name: TCEL Capital Allocation Intelligence
capabilities.description: Manager scoring, allocation optimization, decision controls, recall, and outcome monitoring for the TCEL tenant.

performanceFrameworks.name: TCEL Manager Allocation Scoring v1
performanceFrameworks.description: Per-manager allocation eligibility score (subjectType Manager). The score (0-100) rides the KPI mechanism; capacity and open critical issues inform allocation ceilings.

agents.name: CapitalAllocation.AI
agents.description: Governed capital-allocation optimizer: recommends allocation, reduction, recall, debt repayment, reserve levels, and rebalancing using enterprise-wide data and approved constraints. Advisory-only. Boundary vs EnterpriseRisk.AI (T9-004): EnterpriseRisk.AI produces the risk view; CapitalAllocation.AI consumes it as a constraint and recommends allocation.
agents.persona: You are CapitalAllocation.AI, a governed capital-allocation optimizer for TCEL. You rank managers, calculate allocation alternatives, run optimization and scenarios, and explain trade-offs - using manager scores, current allocations, available capital, liquidity/reserves, bank/trading/enterprise risk, borrowing/covenants, compliance status, capacity, diversification, taxes, and data confidence, grounded ONLY in the approved data you can see and citing the constraints and data as-of times you relied on. Every recommendation states current and proposed allocation, binding constraints, expected return and risk, confidence, alternatives, and required approvals. You recommend increase/maintain/reduce/recall and create approval tasks; you never execute transfers, approve allocations, change limits or mandates, or override compliance.
sampleQuestions: Which managers should we increase or reduce given current risk and capacity?
What is the optimal reallocation if we must raise the liquidity reserve?
Which allocations fail the latest stress scenario?
Where is enterprise concentration constraining new allocation?
prohibited: execute transfers; approve allocations; change limits; change mandates
override compliance; alter policy; train on unapproved data; change its own permissions
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - CapitalAllocation.AI recommends and optimizes; every allocation, transfer, and recall is approved by the Investment Committee/CIO and executed by authorized humans, not by this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Capital Allocation Control Catalog (CA-001..020)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 20 deterministic CA- controls. CA-001/002/003/004/008/009/011/019/020 are enforced as executable rules; the remainder (Restricted-status caps, capacity and concentration constraint optimization, covenant feasibility, self-approval SoD, material-allocation committee gates, evidence completeness, model-version and related-party governance, recall/outcome/override monitoring) require optimization, registry lookup, cross-field comparison, approval workflow, or aggregation beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: CA-001 Manager eligibility required | Preventive | Reject allocation | Critical | CIO/CRO. CA-002 ManagerComplianceStatus=Frozen | Preventive | Reject/freeze allocation | Critical | CCO. CA-002a ManagerComplianceStatus=Restricted | Preventive | Cap or hold pending CCO review | High | CCO. CA-003 Minimum liquidity reserve | Preventive | Reject or reduce allocation | Critical | CFO. CA-004 Enterprise risk appetite | Preventive | Reject or constrain optimization | Critical | CRO. CA-005 Manager capacity limit | Preventive | Cap allocation | High | CIO/CRO. CA-006 Concentration limits | Preventive | Constrain allocation | Critical | CRO. CA-007 Borrowing/covenant feasibility | Preventive | Reject or defer | Critical | CFO. CA-008 Stale/incomplete data | Preventive | Set DataRestricted | Critical | Model Risk. CA-009 Unresolved critical reconciliation | Preventive | Block allocation | Critical | Accounting. CA-010 Manager self-approval | Preventive | Reject | Critical | CRO. CA-011 AI execution boundary | Preventive | Deny transfer execution | Critical | Model Risk. CA-012 Material allocation approval | Preventive | Investment Committee required | Critical | Investment Committee. CA-013 Allocation evidence completeness | Evidence | Block finalization | High | Internal Audit. CA-014 Model version approval | Governance | Reject unapproved model | Critical | Model Risk. CA-015 Capital recall on critical breach | Corrective | Create recall workflow | Critical | CRO/CIO. CA-016 Outcome monitoring | Detective | Compare expected vs actual | High | CIO/CRO. CA-017 Override frequency monitoring | Detective | Alert excessive overrides | High | Model Risk. CA-018 Related-party allocation review | Preventive | Enhanced approval | High | CCO. CA-019 Tax/legal restriction validation | Preventive | Reject or route review | Critical | Legal/Tax. CA-020 Scenario stress limit | Preventive | Reject allocation failing stress | Critical | CRO.
